description: Return the most expensive SANBA interview sessions by total estimated cost (USD/JPY), newest cost model. Read-only over sanba-analytics-* session_summary events (ADR-0061).

configuration.query: FROM sanba-analytics-* | WHERE event_type == "session_summary" | KEEP session_id, product_id, interview_mode, payload.total_usd, payload.total_jpy, occurred_at | SORT payload.total_usd DESC | LIMIT ?limit

limit.description: Maximum number of sessions to return.
